name: sharp_read_replace_exp026
hypothesis: CORRECTED DIAGNOSIS (exp025): the ~0.30 plateau is GDN3-LEARNED (a format shortcut), not frozen-path-produced. The soft within-window read (new_u * kq, a LINEAR key-query scaling) emits value even without a strong key match -> lets GDN3 satisfy CE with generic digits. REPLACE the soft value emission with a SHARP content-addressable read (softmax over prior writes by decayed q.k, reading the stored value) so value emission requires key match. exp017 ADDED this sharp term (soft read still satisfied format); this REPLACES the soft term. If tokacc climbs past 0.30 the soft read enabled the format shortcut and sharp-only forces retrieval; if flat/broken, the format shortcut isn't solely from the soft value term.
